2606.05413.title: CausalPOI: Spatio-Temporal Graph-Based Causal Modeling for Cold-Start POI Check-in Forecasting
2606.05413.paper_summary: As urban environments continue to evolve rapidly, accurately modeling the dynamic behaviour of Points of Interest is essential for supporting data-driven urban planning and commercial decision-making. While recent advancements in spatio-temporal graph learning have improved POI forecasting, most methods rely on proximity-based graphs and correlation-driven modeling, which overlook the functional dependencies between POIs and fail to capture the causal effects of urban interventions. In this paper, we introduce a novel research problem -- cold-start POI check-in forecasting, which aims to predict the future check-in pattern of a newly introduced POI, by modeling its temporal evolution and functional interactions with nearby POIs in a structured urban spatial context. To address these challenges, we propose CausalPOI, a spatio-temporal graph-based causal representation learning framework. CausalPOI leverages Spatio-Temporal Functional Interaction Graph to model semantic and spatial relationships between POIs, and constructs structurally aligned treatment and control graphs to simulate factual and counterfactual scenarios. Extensive experiments on real-world SafeGraph datasets demonstrate that CausalPOI significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines across the board, validating its effectiveness in spatio-temporal forecasting, semantic interaction modeling, and causal effect estimation, providing a more interpretable and actionable foundation for urban intervention analysis. Source code is available at Github.
2606.05413.paper_summary_zh: 隨著城市環境持續快速演變，準確地建模興趣點的動態行為對於支持數據驅動的城市規劃和商業決策至關重要。雖然近期在時空圖學習方面的進展改善了POI預測，但大多數方法依賴於基於接近度的圖和關聯驅動的建模，這忽略了POI之間的功能依賴關係，並未能捕捉城市干預的因果效應。在本文中，我們引入了一個新穎的研究問題——冷啟動POI簽到預測，旨在通過建模新引入的POI的時間演變及其與附近POI的功能互動，來預測其未來的簽到模式，並置於結構化的城市空間背景中。為了應對這些挑戰，我們提出了CausalPOI，一個基於時空圖的因果表示學習框架。CausalPOI利用時空功能互動圖來建模POI之間的語義和空間關係，並構建結構對齊的處理和控制圖，以模擬事實和反事實場景。在現實世界的SafeGraph數據集上進行的廣泛實驗表明，CausalPOI在各方面顯著超越了最先進的基準，驗證了其在時空預測、語義互動建模和因果效應估計方面的有效性，為城市干預分析提供了更具可解釋性和可操作性的基礎。源代碼可在Github上獲得。
2606.05413.author: Zhaoqi Zhang et.al.
2606.05413.authors: Zhaoqi Zhang, Miao Xie, Yi Li, Linyou Cai, Siqiang Luo, Gao Cong
